channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's UFC fights bring historic spectacle to White House
item.description: Seven cage fights will be held on White House grounds to mark the nation's upcoming 250th anniversary.

item.title: Trump says Iran war deal to be signed Sunday, Iran disputes timing
item.description: Pakistan's prime minister, a key mediator in U.S.-Iran talks, said Saturday a peace deal was closer than ever and could be signed soon.

item.title: UK detains sanctioned oil tanker linked to Russian shadow fleet
item.description: British authorities are investigating a sanctioned tanker suspected of being part of Russia's shadow fleet, which ships oil in violation of international rules.

item.title: Telehealth companies influence insurance coverage for obesity drugs
item.description: Telehealth firms provide lifestyle support to help patients on obesity drugs lose weight, but employers also seek their input.
